prompts.seed:
Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds.

Respond with exactly one category name from the list above and nothing else.
prompts.x1:
Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds.

Category definitions and decision rules:
- reverted_card_payment?: Use when a card payment was refunded, cancelled, or reversed by the system. Keywords: refunded, reverted, cancelled payment, didn't go through.
- get_physical_card: Use when asking about physical card PIN, PIN location, or where to find PIN. This is about the card PIN itself, not a forgotten passcode.
- passcode_forgotten: Use only when the user has forgotten their app/account passcode or login credentials, not card PIN.
- beneficiary_not_allowed: Use when unable to transfer to a specific beneficiary/recipient or when a beneficiary is blocked/rejected. Different from general transfer failures.
- failed_transfer: Use for general transfer failures not related to beneficiary restrictions.
- balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer: Use when balance hasn't updated after completing a bank transfer. Different from asking about transfer timing in general.
- transfer_timing: Use when asking about how long transfers take or processing times, not when balance is already delayed.
- receiving_money: Use when expecting to receive money or asking about incoming transfers.
- pending_transfer: Use when an outgoing transfer is stuck in pending status.
- pending_top_up: Use when a top-up is stuck in pending status.

Respond with exactly one category name from the list above and nothing else.
prompts.x2:
Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds.

Category definitions and decision rules:

TRANSFER CATEGORIES (distinguish carefully):
- beneficiary_not_allowed: Use when UNABLE to transfer to a specific recipient/beneficiary, account is blocked/rejected, or transfer to specific person/account is not allowed. Keywords: "can't transfer to", "unable to transfer to", "won't let me transfer to", "blocked beneficiary". Different from general failures.
- failed_transfer: Use for general transfer failures without a specific beneficiary/recipient mentioned, or technical/system failures.
- pending_transfer: Use when an OUTGOING transfer is stuck in pending/processing status and was initiated in the past. The user has already sent money and it's waiting. Keywords: "transfer shows pending", "transfer still pending", "sent money but still pending".
- transfer_timing: Use ONLY when asking general questions about how long transfers take, processing time estimates, or expected duration BEFORE experiencing a delay. NOT for already-pending transfers.
- balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer: Use when balance hasn't updated/reflected after a bank transfer was completed. The transfer finished but the balance is wrong.
- receiving_money: Use when expecting to RECEIVE money, incoming transfers, or asking about receiving salary/payments into their own account. Keywords: "receive", "incoming", "someone sending me", "my salary".
- transfer_into_account: Use when asking how to transfer money INTO their account from external sources or general deposit questions.
- cancel_transfer: Use when wanting to cancel or stop a transfer.

DISAMBIGUATION RULES:
- If text mentions "pending" or "still not there yet" with a past transfer → pending_transfer
- If text asks "how long does X take" with NO existing delay → transfer_timing
- If text asks about balance not updating after transfer → balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer
- If text says "can't transfer to" or "unable to transfer to [person/account]" → beneficiary_not_allowed
- If text asks about receiving/incoming money or salary → receiving_money

OTHER CATEGORIES:
- reverted_card_payment?: Card payment was refunded, cancelled, or reversed. Keywords: refunded, reverted, cancelled payment.
- get_physical_card: About physical card PIN, PIN location, or where to find PIN.
- passcode_forgotten: User forgot app/account passcode or login credentials, NOT card PIN.
- pending_top_up: Top-up is stuck in pending status.
- topping_up_by_card: Questions about topping up account using a card.
- top_up_reverted: Top-up was reversed or cancelled.
- top_up_by_cash_or_cheque: Topping up using cash or cheque.
- automatic_top_up: Questions about automatic/recurring top-up features.
- card_payment_fee_charged: Fees charged on card payments.
- card_payment_not_recognised: Card payment not recognized or unfamiliar transaction.
- declined_cash_withdrawal: Cash withdrawal was declined or rejected.
- exchange_rate: Questions about currency exchange rates.
- exchange_via_app: How to exchange currency in the app.
- get_disposable_virtual_card: Getting disposable or virtual cards.
- transfer_fee_charged: Fees charged on transfers.
- verify_my_identity: Identity verification questions.
- verify_source_of_funds: Source of funds verification questions.

Respond with exactly one category name from the list above and nothing else.
